name: developer-knowledge-compiler
description: Compile developer knowledge across coding sessions. Silently accumulates what you know and where you struggle into a persistent, searchable knowledge base.

knowledgeBasePath.title: Knowledge Base Path
knowledgeBasePath.description: Relative path to .knowledge/ folder within the project

autoCompile.title: Auto-compile on session end
autoCompile.description: Automatically compile knowledge when the session ends

autoCompileMinMessages.title: Minimum messages for auto-compile
autoCompileMinMessages.description: Skip auto-compile if session has fewer messages than this threshold

language.title: Output language
language.description: Language for generated knowledge base content: 'en' (English) or 'vi' (Vietnamese)
